nasb.text: Remember, O Lord, the reproach of Your servants; How I bear in my bosom the reproach of all the many peoples,

esv.text: Remember, O Lord, how your servants are mocked, and how I bear in my heart the insults of all the many nations,

cnv.text: 主啊！求你記念你僕人所受的羞辱， 記念我心裡承擔著萬民的羞辱。

ccb.text: 主啊，求你顾念你仆人——我所受的羞辱， 我心中如何忍受列国的嘲笑。

csbs.text: 主啊，求你记住你仆人们所受的辱骂， 记住我如何在怀中承受万民的辱骂！
